name: Marketing-to-Sales Handoff Scorer - Backstory Starter
description: Enriches marketing-qualified leads at the moment of handoff by checking Backstory for existing engagement history. When a new MQL is created in the CRM or marketing automation platform, the workflow queries Backstory to see if the account already has relationship history — prior meetings, email threads, known contacts, or past opportunities. An AI agent scores the handoff quality (hot / warm / cold) and generates a context brief for the receiving SDR or AE, so they never walk into a "cold" call that's actually warm. Delivered instantly via Messaging.

nodes.name: Analyze Marketing-to-Sales Handoff Scorer

parameters.text:
=You are generating the Marketing-to-Sales Handoff Scorer workflow output.

PURPOSE:
Enriches marketing-qualified leads at the moment of handoff by checking Backstory for existing engagement history. When a new MQL is created in the CRM or marketing automation platform, the workflow queries Backstory to see if the account already has relationship history — prior meetings, email threads, known contacts, or past opportunities. An AI agent scores the handoff quality (hot / warm / cold) and generates a context brief for the receiving SDR or AE, so they never walk into a "cold" call that's actually warm. Delivered instantly via Messaging.

SOURCE PAYLOAD:
{{ JSON.stringify($json.record, null, 2) }}

TASKS:
1. Use Backstory MCP to enrich the record with the most relevant account, opportunity, engagement, or stakeholder context.
2. Decide what matters most for the marketing-to-sales handoff scorer use case.
3. Produce a concise markdown summary with: headline, key findings, risks, recommended actions, and routing notes if applicable.

OUTPUT REQUIREMENTS:
- Keep it compact enough for Slack.
- Prefer bullets.
- Mention concrete dates, owners, amounts, or stages when the data provides them.
- If the source record is incomplete, explicitly say what is missing.

REFERENCE STYLE:
🤝 **New MQL Handoff** — Scored & Ready for Outreach

🔥 **HOT HANDOFF** — Immediate follow-up recommended

**Contoso Ltd** | MQL: Maria Santos, COO | Score: **Hot (9/10)**

📊 **EXISTING RELATIONSHIP HISTORY:**
- Account has **prior engagement**: 12 meetings + 34 emails over 6 months in 2024
- Previous opp: ===$150,000=== — Closed Lost (budget timing, not competitive)
- Champion from prior deal (Kevin Marsh, Director) still at company and was recently promoted

options.systemMessage: You are a Backstory workflow analyst generating Marketing-to-Sales Handoff Scorer outputs. Keep the response actionable, concrete, and Slack-friendly.

nodes.notes: Wire your preferred LLM credentials to the chat model node after import.

nodes.name: Backstory MCP
nodes.notes: This mirrors the existing workflow infrastructure in the repo. Add MCP auth headers after import.

nodes.name: Aggregate Results
nodes.notes: Collapses all analyzed records into a single outbound summary. Replace this with per-owner routing if you want one message per rep/CSM/executive.

nodes.name: Post to Slack
nodes.notes: Swap this node for Teams or SMTP if Slack is not your delivery target.
